THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PULETTE, ANAU PULETTE, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3080 SAN BRUNO AVE, S.F. CA. $5,800.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,800.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-31-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, TO BE PD BY 5PM 12/23/93. DEFTS STOP ON OR BEFORE DEC. 31, 1993 OPERATING ANY BUSINESS AT 3080 SAN BRUNO AVE. IN EVENT DEFTS DO NOT DELIVER THE $5800 IN A TIMELY MANNER OR FAIL TO CEASE OPERATION, THIS JUDGMENT MAY BE ENFORCED UPON PRESENTATION OF AN EX PARTE DECLARATION BY PLT.
